prose:
Method provenance
Property: Condensed atomic Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor for acrolein; headline value reported here is the largest electrophilic Fukui index f⁺.
Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (no density fitting, exact four-center integrals) in PySCF v2.x.
Geometry provenance: single-point evaluation on the supplied fixed geometry (/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz); no further optimization performed (notation: property//input-geom).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).  N±1 states were treated as doublets (charge ±1, mult 2) per default.
Software: chemkit fukui-reactivity skill (engine_subcommand `fukui`) calling PySCF for all three SCF calculations.  SCF cycles converged; integrity.status = ok, trustworthy = true.
Warnings: the result JSON carried no `warnings` array (no engine warnings reported).  Integrity checks (schema_header, fukui charge conservation) all passed (`ok: true`), issued with informational severity "warning".
Reproducibility artifacts: live engine log was streamed to a file named automatically by chemkit (e.g. `fukui_YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.out`) in the working directory during execution; key result files:
 • Output JSON: /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpf4czudd7/live.json
 • Fukui bar-chart PNG: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/argo_o3/20260704-044451_acrolein_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png

Key numerical results (per-atom indices, Mulliken charges):
Atom (index)   f⁺        f⁻        Dual (f⁺–f⁻)
O (0)          0.40136419   0.39388616   0.0074780351
C (1)          0.022255106  0.0059884352 0.01626667
C (2)          0.43404673   0.091403097  0.34264363
C (3)          0.64232102   0.087369815  0.5549512  ← most electrophilic site
H (4)         –0.1572595    0.085961423 –0.24322092
H (5)         –0.2072029    0.1856796   –0.39288251
H (6)         –0.062116996  0.084485809 –0.14660281
H (7)         –0.073407645  0.065225658 –0.1386333

Headline value
f⁺ (electrophilic Fukui index) of the β-carbon (atom 4, index 3): 0.64232102
